title: Vigorous Key Distribution for Privacy Preserving Personal Health Record Encryption in Cloud Computing
description: Reproducibility package for the Vigorous Key Distribution Strategy (VKDS) for privacy-preserving Personal Health Record encryption in cloud computing. The package includes synthetic PHR data generation, Diffie-Hellman secret generation, QKD-inspired key generation, Non-Abelian Encryption based fragment encryption and decryption, hash-based signature verification, performance benchmarking, and figure-generation scripts.

creators.name: Jayanthi, S.
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Anna University, BIT Campus, Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

creators.name: Valarmathi, A.
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Applications, Anna University, BIT Campus, Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

notes: This archive contains custom code and synthetic data-generation scripts only. No real patient records, clinical identifiers, or personally identifiable health information are included.
